reason: User-directed research; council unanimous. Dispositive: superpowers is a Claude-only plugin and skill-tuneup ships identically to claude/codex/agy, so any reference is a dead pointer on two of three CLIs. Also: brainstorming is divergent design exploration, tuneup is a convergent bounded-fix pipeline; its safeguards already exist at the right points (research=Steps 4-5, alternatives+critique=council #1, approval=CHECKPOINT); redesign-grade findings surface at the checkpoint where the user can peel off into an interactive brainstorm.
title: Do not adopt superpowers:brainstorming into skill-tuneup

reason: All proven candidates live in the Claude-only superpowers plugin, so no referential adoption is cross-CLI-safe by construction; only conceptual absorption is, and those concepts are already embodied (eval gate=RED-GREEN, council-verdict triage with reasons=receiving-code-review, real/assertion/flaky table=systematic-debugging, triage parallel skims=dispatching-agents). deep-research and skill-creator are already integrated where they pay (Step 5; process doc).
title: No other ecosystem-skill adoptions (writing-skills, skill-creator, verification-before-completion, receiving-code-review, systematic-debugging, dispatching-parallel-agents)
